title: Admitted to Astribot as Robot Algorithm Researcher
description: Robot Algorithm Researcher at Astribot, a Frontier Tech Exploration Center AI Lab.

title: Paper 'REAL' submitted — robust extreme agility for legged robots
description: 'REAL: Robust Extreme Agility via Spatio-Temporal Policy Learning and Physics-Guided Filtering' submitted for review. Zero-shot transfer on Unitree Go2.

title: Robot-LLM-Align released — LLM fine-tuning & ReAct agent for robot control
description: End-to-end SFT+DPO alignment pipeline on Qwen2.5 with LoRA, achieving 91% instruction accuracy. Self-built ReAct agent system for task planning and tool-calling.

title: Admitted to HKUST(GZ) MPhil in AI with full scholarship
description: Incoming M.Phil. student in Artificial Intelligence at The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (Guangzhou), fully funded.

title: National 1st Prize at 22nd ROBOCON (Top 16 / 150+ teams)
description: Led GDUT ROBOCON team as captain to national 1st prize at the 22nd ABU China Selection.
